archive_data.question_text: अल्लाह रक्खा, साबिर खान, पंडित किशन महाराज, पंडित ज्ञान प्रकाश घोष और संदीप दास निम्नलिखित में से किस वाद्य यंत्र के प्रसिद्ध वादक हैं?

explanation.english: These artists are renowned exponents of the Tabla, a percussion instrument central to Hindustani classical music.
explanation.tanglish: Ivarghal ellam Hindustani klassiscal sangeethathil mukkiyamana thabala vaadhiyathil velundhadhu petra kalaijnargal.

archive_data.question_text: राष्ट्रीीय आय लेखांकन की किस पद्धति में उत्पादन केंद्रोंों को प्राथमिक, द्वितीयक और तृतीयक क्षेत्रोंों में वर्गीकृत करना शामिल है?

explanation.english: The Production Approach classifies economic activities into primary, secondary, and tertiary sectors to calculate national income.
explanation.tanglish: Utpadan muraiyil, desiya varambu kanakku seivadhardhardhaka hardhathai mudal, irandam, moonram vagaiyaga punithu kollappadum.

archive_data.question_text: Which Indian state has the world's longest highway tunnel (as of July 2023)?

explanation.english: Himachal Pradesh houses the Atal Tunnel (Rohtang), which is the longest highway tunnel in India and the world above 10,000 feet.
explanation.tanglish: Himachal Pradeshil ulla Atal Tunnel, Indiaavil mattum illamal 10,000 adi meel ulla ulagin neelamana highway tunnel.

archive_data.question_text: निम्नलिखित में से कौन 1867 में स्थापित एक सुधारवादी समाज 'प्रार्थना समाज' से संबंधित नहीं है?

explanation.english: Bal Gangadhar Tilak was a nationalist leader not associated with the Prarthana Samaj, whereas the others were its founders or prominent members.
explanation.tanglish: Bal Gangadhar Tilak, Prarthana Samaj oda uravu illatha desiya thalaivar; matravargal andha sangathin arpudhalalar alladhu pagudhargal.

archive_data.question_text: According to Census 2011, which union territory has the highest male literacy rate?

explanation.english: According to the 2011 Census data, Lakshadweep recorded the highest male literacy rate among all Union Territories of India.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 Census padhivugal prakaram, India ookkumia nadaagangalil Lakshadweepil aan padicharivu visadam athigam.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Schedules of the Constitution of India have immunity from Judicial Review?

explanation.english: The 9th Schedule was added by the 1st Constitutional Amendment to protect certain laws, particularly land reforms, from being challenged in courts.
explanation.tanglish: 9avadhu Schedule, nilathathu seirpeetal matrum konjha seithigalukku nyaayasthanathil poraadi padhandhadhai kappaaga serthukondadhu.

archive_data.question_text: The Mahabodhi Temple is in which of these states?

explanation.english: The Mahabodhi Temple Complex is a UNESCO World Heritage Site located in Bodh Gaya, Bihar, where Lord Buddha attained enlightenment.
explanation.tanglish: Mahabodhi kovil complex, Bihar ulla Bodh Gayaavil ulladhu; inge Prabu Buddha gnaanam adaindhaar.
